purpose: Regression fixture for claim-strength calibration and overclaim detection.

central_claim.text: Pathway X is a causal driver of phenotype Y.

available_evidence.description: Feature ranking and pathway enrichment associate pathway X with phenotype Y.
Synthetic standard requiring perturbation/rescue or equivalent causal design for mechanism claims.

expected_reviewer_action.required_narrowing: candidate prioritization associated with phenotype Y
expected_reviewer_action.decisive_support_readout: Perturbation of pathway X changes phenotype Y in the predicted direction and rescue restores it under donor-level replication.
expected_reviewer_action.decisive_weakening_readout: The effect disappears after donor-level modeling, perturbation does not change phenotype Y, or composition/severity explains the signal.
